_meta.purpose: Owl-themed Clerk localization for PTOwl auth screens. Edit here, not in main.tsx — the strings get imported and the `{animal}` placeholder is filled at runtime from `_animal_roster`.
_meta.edited_when: Rarely. Strings are user-facing copy; treat changes like a marketing edit (review for tone, ship via PR).

_animal_notes: Roster of 'Doctor X' greetings used by the {animal} placeholder. Curated for a therapy-clinic context — calming, woodland or quiet-water themed, mostly real (Hoo/owl, Vesper/fox, Reed/heron, Glen/stag, Brook/otter, Birch/lynx, Cove/dolphin, Lark/songbird, Sage/badger) with one mythical (Ember/phoenix). Avoid alpha-predator names (no Wolf/Bear/Hawk) — they read aggressive against a relaxation-positioned product. Add or trim freely; the runtime picks randomly per visit.

start.title: Welcome back, Doctor {animal}.
start.subtitle: Sign in to print schedules in 5 keypresses.

password.title: Enter your password
password.subtitle: Welcome back. We saved your perch.

emailCode.title: Check your email
emailCode.subtitle: A one-time code is on its way.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No judgement. Pick how to reset it.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Make it memorable. Make it weird.

start.title: Pleased to meet you, Doctor.
start.subtitle: Free during beta. No credit card, ever.

emailCode.title: Check your email
emailCode.subtitle: A one-time code is on its way.

continue.title: Almost there
continue.subtitle: A couple more details and you are done.
